name: GP8403 Component
description: The ``gp8403`` (12-bit) and ``gp8413`` (15-bit) are 2-channel DAC output modules respectively. They require an [I2C](https://esphome.io/components/i2c/) to be setup.

config_entries.label: Model
config_entries.description: GP8403 for the 12 bit model and GP8413 for the 15 bit model. Defaults to GP8403.

config_entries.label: Voltage
config_entries.description: The output voltage range of the DAC. Must be one of `5V` or `10V`.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.
